title: Tross Permission Configuration
description: Single source of truth for role-based access control (RBAC). AUTO-GENERATED from entity metadata - run sync-permissions.js to regenerate.

customer.description: Basic access - can view own data and work orders

technician.description: Executes work orders, can view user list

manager.description: Manages operations - can view roles, manage work orders

admin.description: Full system access - can manage users, roles, and all resources

rowLevelSecurity.description: Customers access files via parent entity RLS
Technicians access files via parent entity RLS
Dispatcher+ have full access to all file attachments

navVisibility.description: Derived from read permission - nav visibility follows read access

admin_panel.description: Admin control center - system health, sessions, audit logs

navVisibility.description: Derived from read permission - nav visibility follows read access

rowLevelSecurity.description: Customers see requests they created
Dispatcher+ see all approval requests

navVisibility.description: Explicit navVisibility - minimum role to see in nav menus

rowLevelSecurity.description: Customers see assets in units they own/occupy
Staff see all assets

navVisibility.description: Explicit navVisibility - minimum role to see in nav menus

rowLevelSecurity.description: Only admin can access audit logs

create.description: Operation disabled - create is system-only (not available via API)

update.description: Operation disabled - update is system-only (not available via API)

delete.description: Operation disabled - delete is system-only (not available via API)
